title: Registration of reusable or upclassified Class I devices and/or expiring CE certificates
body: "The EU has extended the validity of certain Directive 93/42/EEC on medical devices (EU MDD) and Directive 90/385/EEC on active implantable medical devices (EU AIMDD) certificates. This guidance sets out what this means for registration and managing registered devices in the MHRA Device Online Registration System (DORS). "
